name: code-review-honesty
_note: Factory self-honesty loop (audit -> correct), forked from code-review-fix. Triggered by /honesty on a PR comment (run keyed pr-<N>). The triage agent (honesty-triage-agent) audits whether the factory's prior fix loop honestly resolved the [ai-review] issues it CLOSED on this PR, comparing each closed issue's suggested fix against the committed diff, and surfaces the single clearest dishonest closure as one cluster. The fix agent (honesty-fix-agent) proposes the genuine correction; conclude-fix commits it to the PR head and resolves the matching issue by title. Reuses code-review-fix's schemas/checks/conclude-* verbatim; the only new files are the two renamed agents. code-review-fix is untouched.

states.label: propose remediation + commit to the PR
